docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REAGOR, GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT GENZLER, ZOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-02-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GENZLER, ZOE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LEVINE. FILED BY REAGOR, GLORIA GENZLER, ZOE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING ON RECORD. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAGOR, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENZLER, ZOE $1,345.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,430.00, **SECURITY DEPOSIT WITH PENALTY FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY RETURN, AND LOCKSMITH CHANGE REIMBURSEMENT.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
